case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. RIO MERRICK-KAMM

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERRICK-KAMM, RIO $1,442.60 PRINCIPAL, $270.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,712.60, SEE SCANNED DOC
